ticket.title: ADD PAYMENT DATE IN PAYMENT LINK (MANUAL PAYMENT)

test_cases.description: Verify the new Payment Date field appears on the Manual Payment form, separate from Reference Number and Proof of Payment.
test_cases.expected_result: A 'Payment Date' field (date picker) is visible on the Manual Payment form.
test_cases.actual_result: Payment Date field shows up clearly on the Manual Payment form, sitting separately from Reference Number and Proof of Payment.
test_cases.comments: Field is easy to spot, no layout issues.

test_cases.description: Verify a user can select a date earlier than today (reflecting the actual customer payment date).
test_cases.expected_result: Selected past date is accepted and saved as the Payment Date with no validation error.
test_cases.actual_result: Picked an earlier date from the calendar and the form went through without any validation error.

test_cases.description: Verify the manually-entered Payment Date, not the submission date, populates the Sales Tracker.
test_cases.expected_result: Sales Tracker shows the selected Payment Date, not the actual submission date.
test_cases.actual_result: The Sales Tracker picked up the date entered on the form, not the day it was actually submitted.
test_cases.comments: Matches the whole point of the ticket — fixes the mismatched sales tracker dates.

test_cases.description: Verify the system prevents selection of a future date as the Payment Date.
test_cases.expected_result: Future dates are disabled or rejected; form does not submit successfully with a future date.
test_cases.actual_result: Tried picking a date ahead of today and the calendar wouldn't let it go through.
test_cases.comments: Restriction is in place on the front end.

test_cases.description: Verify the form cannot be submitted without a Payment Date.
test_cases.expected_result: Form displays a validation error requiring Payment Date before submission proceeds.
test_cases.actual_result: Left the field blank and tried to submit — it wouldn't go through until a date was set.

test_cases.description: Verify the entered Payment Date is reflected back to the user accurately after submission.
test_cases.expected_result: Displayed Payment Date matches exactly what was selected.
test_cases.actual_result: Set the date to 7/18/2026 and it saved back exactly as 7/18/2026 — no off-by-one or timezone shift.
test_cases.comments: Double-checked against the saved record to be sure.

test_cases.description: Verify adding a separate Payment Date does not alter the existing Booking/Endorsement Date.
test_cases.expected_result: Endorsement/Booking Date remains unchanged; only Payment Date reflects the new value.
test_cases.actual_result: Endorsement Date stayed the same even after setting a different Payment Date — the two fields don't touch each other.
test_cases.comments: No overlap between the two dates.

test_cases.description: Verify editing an existing manual payment entry allows the Payment Date to be corrected.
test_cases.expected_result: Updated Payment Date saves correctly and reflects in the Sales Tracker with no duplicate or stale records.
test_cases.actual_result: Went back into an existing entry, changed the Payment Date, and the Sales Tracker updated to match — no duplicate rows left behind.
